definitions: 灌溉；灌溉系统（尤指把水引入农田以供作物生长）

examples.text: Once north of Cairo, most of the Nile water is diverted into more than 10,000 kilometres of irrigation canals and only a small proportion reaches the sea directly through the rivers in the delta.
examples.explanation: 这里的 irrigation canals 指“灌溉渠道/灌溉运河”，说明尼罗河水被引入大量人工水道，用于农业灌溉，因此 irrigation 在本句中表示“灌溉、供水灌田”。
